title: CAT OS Word DNA content item, schema v1
description: One Word DNA unit: a root, a prefix, a suffix, a foreign-word group, or a CAT-register vocabulary set (WORD_DNA_BIBLE §4). Every word, meaning, synonym, antonym, and origin note in `members` is transcribed faithfully from the owner's source PDFs (99_REFERENCE/); nothing there is invented. The only authored content is the teaching layer: `unit.mentor_note`, `discovery.notice_prompt`, `discovery.understand_note`, and the prompts/options in `discovery`, exactly as every other module's teach.js authors commentary around fixed content. Exactly one member is held out for root/prefix/suffix kinds (the Apply/transfer word, WORD_DNA_BIBLE §3 step 4); exactly two are held out for foreign/cat_vocab kinds (WORD_DNA_BIBLE §3a, since those kinds have no shared root to transfer and instead use a second in-context recognition item). Validation subset: see src/core/content-loader/validator.js.

kind.description: The Language Tree branch this unit belongs to (WORD_DNA_BIBLE §2). "confused" is reserved for a future Frequently Confused Words batch; no content ships under it yet.

title.description: Display name for the Tree card, e.g. "chron", "ante-", "German words", "High Frequency, A (i)".

publication.description: Which of the two owner-supplied PDFs this unit was transcribed from.

label.description: The root/prefix/suffix itself ("chron", "ante-"), or the group name ("German", "High Frequency, A (i)").

origin_language.description: "Greek" | "Latin" | "Germanic" | the borrowing language for foreign groups | null for cat_vocab, which has no single origin.

core_meaning.description: The shared meaning every member inherits, e.g. "time" for chron-. Null for foreign/cat_vocab kinds, which have no shared meaning to state (WORD_DNA_BIBLE §3a) — enforced in the loader, not just here.

mentor_note.description: One authored sentence on why this family/group matters, or — for the first foreign-word unit — the honesty note that borrowed words are met, not decoded.

members.description: Every word this unit teaches, source-faithful. Exactly one is held_out for root/prefix/suffix kinds; exactly two for foreign/cat_vocab kinds (WORD_DNA_BIBLE §3/§3a).

context_sentence.description: Authored teaching layer (never source content): a sentence using the word correctly, so foreign/cat_vocab members can be met in context per CAT_VARC_BIBLE §21's own vocabulary-in-context philosophy.

notice_prompt.description: The curiosity-gap opener shown with the taught (non-held-out) members, e.g. "What do these words share?"

predict_options.description: Three chips for the Notice+Predict step, exactly one correct. For root/prefix/suffix, guesses unit.core_meaning; for foreign/cat_vocab, guesses the first taught member's meaning in context.

understand_note.description: Authored: why the meaning threads through every taught member, or (foreign/cat_vocab) one line of context/etymology worth keeping.

applies.description: The transfer/apply challenge(s): one per held_out member, same order. Root/prefix/suffix carry exactly 1; foreign/cat_vocab carry exactly 2 (WORD_DNA_BIBLE §3/§3a).
